data.title: Ukraine Plans 10% to 23% Crypto Tax to Boost Budget and Military Aid
data.description:
The post Ukraine Plans 10% to 23% Crypto Tax to Boost Budget and Military Aid appeared first on Coinpedia Fintech News
Ukraine is moving forward with its plan to legalize and tax cryptocurrencies, aiming to generate funds for its budget and military. Ukrainian lawmakers are working on a crypto tax bill, with the final version expected by mid-2025. The proposed tax rates range from 5% to 10%,...

data.title: Planet Lunch News
Bitcoin spot ETF had a total net inflow of $94.3361 million yesterday, the first net inflow after net outflows in the past 8 days
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (February 28, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$94.3361 million.
Yesterday, Grayscale ETF GBTC had a net outflow of US$33.2764 million in a single day, and the current historical net outflow of GBTC is US$22.295 billion.
Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust ETF BTC had a net inflow of US$5.5901 million in a single day, and the current total historical net inflow of Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust BTC is US$1.051 billion.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Ark Invest and 21Shares' ETF ARKB, with a net inflow of US$194 million in a single day, and the current total historical net inflow of ARKB reached US$2.726 billion.
The second is Fidelity ETF FBTC, with a single-day net inflow of US$176 million. Currently, FBTC's total historical net inflow has reached US$11.764 billion.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETF is US$95.379 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to Bitcoin's total market value) is 5.71%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$36.942 billion.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETF had a total net outflow of US$41.8245 million yesterday, continuing its net outflow for 7 consecutive days
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (February 28, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Ethereum spot ETF was 41.8245 million US dollars.
Yesterday, Grayscale Ethereum Trust ETF ETHE had a single-day net outflow of 11.6602 million US dollars, and the current historical net outflow of ETHE is 4.075 billion US dollars.
Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETF ETH had a single-day net outflow of 0.00 US dollars, and the current historical total net inflow of Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETH is 605 million US dollars.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETF is 8.063 billion US dollars, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Ethereum) is 3.02%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached 2.819 billion US dollars.

data.title: Ethereum Spot ETF Experiences Significant Net Outflow
data.description: According to PANews, data from SoSoValue indicates that on February 28, 2025, Ethereum spot ETFs experienced a total net outflow of $41.82 million. On the same day, the Grayscale Ethereum Trust ETF (ETHE) saw a single-day net outflow of $11.66 million, bringing its historical net outflow to $4.075 billion. Meanwhile, the Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETF reported no net outflow, maintaining a historical total net inflow of $605 million. As of the latest update, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETFs stands at $8.063 billion, with an ETF net asset ratio of 3.02% relative to Ethereum's total market capitalization. The historical cumulative net inflow has reached $2.819 billion.

data.title: US judge tosses SEC fraud suit against Hex founder Richard Heart
data.description:
A US judge tossed the SEC’s case against Hex founder Richard Heart, stating it couldn’t decide whether he defrauded investors of $12.1 million because the US lacked jurisdiction.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/us-judge-dismisses-sec-fraud-lawsuit-against-hex-crypto-founder?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 86,000 USDT with a 7.47% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 01, 2025, 04:32 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 86,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 86,187.5 USDT, with a narrowed 7.47% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Solana Co-founder: Bitcoin is an insurance, not an investment
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Solana co-founder Toly said in response to community members, "Bitcoin has no value. To put it in a better way, it's insurance. Based on my life experience, a superpower has a 1% chance of collapse every year. For me, it's worth spending 1% of my wealth to buy some assets that may not go to zero in that environment. This is not an investment, but a cost, and there is no guarantee that it will work. Bitcoin can do this at both $100,000 and $10,000. If it works, it has little to do with technology other than the original innovation 15 years ago."
